checks.evidence: Object pose and vector motion are separate provider streams into the same projected-motion processor.
Motion streams stay on providers; breath volume and dynamics stay on processors; feedback state stays on a sink.
Synthetic and replay deployments are describable without live platform APIs.
The profile fixture names common projection, calibration, smoothing, classifier, and quality controls without source-specific runtime ownership.
The package validator and pure core check valid and damaged profile/command payload fixtures before any runtime mutation.
Generic pose, vector, controller-shaped, wearable-acceleration-shaped, and external patch-stream bridge source descriptors map into the same pose/vector processor streams without runtime adapters.
Source binding fixtures connect profile intent, selected source adapter, and pose/vector stream contracts without starting adapters or runtime execution.
Object-pose, vector-motion, and external patch-channel payload fixtures normalize into processor input sample shapes without live transports.
